title: decide-monitor-arm output
description: Decision record from decide-monitor-arm. The slash-command epilogue copies armed_line verbatim and (when arm == 'cron') passes cron_create_args to CronCreate.

schedule.description: Cron expression (e.g. '*/5 * * * *') when arm=='cron'; null otherwise.

armed_line.description: Literal final-line-of-stdout the slash command must emit; matches the Stop hook's regex by construction.

cron_create_args.description: Ready-to-pass keyword args for the CronCreate Claude Code tool when arm=='cron'; null otherwise.
